commands.review_summary:
The PR appends available OpenAI Responses status/id/model identifiers to detail-less `response.failed` errors and expands the `no_error_details` classifier/tests for the suffixed message.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: a `response.failed` event without `response.error` and without `response.incomplete_details.reason` deterministically reaches the generic fallback in `src/agents/openai-transport-stream.ts`. I did not establish a live provider replay in this read-only review.
